languages.text: "Лария — не только мой сенешаль, но и моя дочь". {n}Голос Вольного Торговца становится строже.{/n} "Я не позволю вам даже задумываться о том, что она не на моей стороне. Пусть сомнительные обстоятельства ее рождения и не позволяют мне признать ее наследницей дома фон Валанциус, Лария верно служит династии. Как сенешаль она заслуживает моего полного доверия и поддержит любое решение. Вы можете сами в этом убедиться, поговорив с ней".

"Laria is not only my Seneschal, but also my daughter." {n}The Rogue Trader's tone hardens.{/n} "I will not allow you to even ponder the possibility that she is not on my side. Though the dubious circumstances of her birth bar me from recognising her as the heir to House von Valancius, Laria has served the dynasty faithfully. As Seneschal, she deserves my full trust and will support any decision I make. Speak with her and you will see that for yourself."
languages.original_text: "Лария — не только мой сенешаль, но и моя дочь". {n}Голос Вольного Торговца становится строже.{/n} "Я не позволю вам даже задумываться о том, что она не на моей стороне. Пусть сомнительные обстоятельства ее рождения и не позволяют мне признать ее наследницей дома фон Валанциус, Лария верно служит династии. Как сенешаль она заслуживает моего полного доверия и поддержит любое решение. Вы можете сами в этом убедиться, поговорив с ней".

Though the dubious circumstances of her birth bar me from recognising her as the heir to House von Valancius, Laria has served the dynasty faithfully. As Seneschal, she deserves my full trust and will support any decision I make. Speak with her and you will see that for yourself."

"Laria is not only my Seneschal, but also my daughter." {n}The Rogue Trader's tone hardens.{/n} "I will not allow you to even ponder the possibility that she is not on my side. Though the dubious circumstances of her birth bar me from recognising her as the heir to House von Valancius, Laria has served the dynasty faithfully. As Seneschal, she deserves my full trust and will support any decision I make. Speak with her and you will see that for yourself."

"Laria is not only my Seneschal, but also my daughter." {n}The Rogue Trader's tone hardens.{/n} "I will not allow you to even ponder the possibility that she is not on my side. Though the dubious circumstances of her birth bar me from recognising her as the heir to House von Valancius, Laria has served the dynasty faithfully. As Seneschal, she deserves my full trust and will support any decision I make. Speak with her and you will see that for yourself."

languages.text: “菈丽雅不仅是我的总领，也是我的女儿。”{n}行商浪人的语气冷硬起来。{/n}“我绝不会允许你妄自揣测她对我的忠诚。尽管她的出身存在争议，使我无法承认她是冯·瓦兰修斯家的继承人，但菈丽雅一直忠心耿耿地为王朝效力。身为总领，她完全配得上我的信任，也会支持我的一切决定。你去同她谈谈，便知我此言不虚。”
languages.original_text: "Laria is not only my Seneschal, but also my daughter." {n}The Rogue Trader's tone hardens.{/n} "I will not allow you to even ponder the possibility that she is not on my side. Though the dubious circumstances of her birth bar me from recognising her as the heir to House von Valancius, Laria has served the dynasty faithfully. As Seneschal, she deserves my full trust and will support any decision I make. Speak with her and you will see that for yourself."

traits.locale_text: “菈丽雅不仅是我的总领，也是我的女儿。”{n}行商浪人的语气冷硬起来。{/n}“我绝不会允许你妄自揣测她对我的忠诚。尽管她的出身存在争议，使我无法承认她是冯·瓦兰修斯家的继承人，但菈丽雅一直忠心耿耿地为王朝效力。身为总领，她完全配得上我的信任，也会支持我的一切决定。你去同她谈谈，便知我此言不虚。”

languages.text: « Laria n'est pas seulement ma sénéchale, c'est aussi ma fille. » {n}La voix du libre-marchand se fait plus dure.{/n} « Je vous interdis ne serait-ce que d'envisager la possibilité qu'elle me trahisse. Si les circonstances douteuses de sa naissance m'empêchent de la reconnaître comme héritière de la maison von Valancius, sa loyauté envers la dynastie ne s'est jamais démentie. En tant que sénéchale, elle mérite mon entière confiance et soutient systématiquement mes décisions, quelles qu'elles soient. Interrogez-la, vous verrez par vous-même. »
languages.original_text: "Laria is not only my Seneschal, but also my daughter." {n}The Rogue Trader's tone hardens.{/n} "I will not allow you to even ponder the possibility that she is not on my side. Though the dubious circumstances of her birth bar me from recognising her as the heir to House von Valancius, Laria has served the dynasty faithfully. As Seneschal, she deserves my full trust and will support any decision I make. Speak with her and you will see that for yourself."

traits.locale_text: « Laria n'est pas seulement ma sénéchale, c'est aussi ma fille. » {n}La voix du libre-marchand se fait plus dure.{/n} « Je vous interdis ne serait-ce que d'envisager la possibilité qu'elle me trahisse. Si les circonstances douteuses de sa naissance m'empêchent de la reconnaître comme héritière de la maison von Valancius, sa loyauté envers la dynastie ne s'est jamais démentie. En tant que sénéchale, elle mérite mon entière confiance et soutient systématiquement mes décisions, quelles qu'elles soient. Interrogez-la, vous verrez par vous-même. »

languages.text: "Laria yalnızca Seneşal'im değil, aynı zamanda kızımdır." {n}Hür Tacir'in sesi sertleşiyor.{/n} "Onun yanımda olmadığı olasılığını düşünmene müsaade etmem. Doğumunun şüpheli koşulları onu von Valancius Hanesi'nin vârisi olarak tanımama engel olsa da Laria, hanedanlığa sadakatle hizmet etmiştir. Seneşal olarak güvenimi sonuna kadar hak ediyor. Aldığım her türlü kararı destekleyecektir. Onunla konuştuğunda bu gerçeği bizzat fark edeceksin."
languages.original_text: "Laria is not only my Seneschal, but also my daughter." {n}The Rogue Trader's tone hardens.{/n} "I will not allow you to even ponder the possibility that she is not on my side. Though the dubious circumstances of her birth bar me from recognising her as the heir to House von Valancius, Laria has served the dynasty faithfully. As Seneschal, she deserves my full trust and will support any decision I make. Speak with her and you will see that for yourself."

traits.locale_text: "Laria yalnızca Seneşal'im değil, aynı zamanda kızımdır." {n}Hür Tacir'in sesi sertleşiyor.{/n} "Onun yanımda olmadığı olasılığını düşünmene müsaade etmem. Doğumunun şüpheli koşulları onu von Valancius Hanesi'nin vârisi olarak tanımama engel olsa da Laria, hanedanlığa sadakatle hizmet etmiştir. Seneşal olarak güvenimi sonuna kadar hak ediyor. Aldığım her türlü kararı destekleyecektir. Onunla konuştuğunda bu gerçeği bizzat fark edeceksin."

languages.text: «Laria es, además de mi Senescal, mi hija». {n}El tono del Comerciante Independiente se endurece.{/n} «No permitiré que se plantee siquiera la posibilidad de que no esté de mi parte. Aunque las dudosas circunstancias de su nacimiento me impiden reconocerla como heredera de la casa von Valancius, sirve fielmente a la dinastía. Como Senescal, disfruta de mi plena confianza y apoyará cualquier decisión que tome. Si habla con ella, podrá comprobarlo».
languages.original_text: "Laria is not only my Seneschal, but also my daughter." {n}The Rogue Trader's tone hardens.{/n} "I will not allow you to even ponder the possibility that she is not on my side. Though the dubious circumstances of her birth bar me from recognising her as the heir to House von Valancius, Laria has served the dynasty faithfully. As Seneschal, she deserves my full trust and will support any decision I make. Speak with her and you will see that for yourself."

traits.locale_text: «Laria es, además de mi Senescal, mi hija». {n}El tono del Comerciante Independiente se endurece.{/n} «No permitiré que se plantee siquiera la posibilidad de que no esté de mi parte. Aunque las dudosas circunstancias de su nacimiento me impiden reconocerla como heredera de la casa von Valancius, sirve fielmente a la dinastía. Como Senescal, disfruta de mi plena confianza y apoyará cualquier decisión que tome. Si habla con ella, podrá comprobarlo».

languages.text: "Laria ist nicht nur meine Truchsessin, sondern auch meine Tochter." {n}Der Ton des Freihändlers verhärtet sich.{/n} "Ich lasse nicht zu, dass Ihr auch nur andeutet, Sie stünde nicht auf meiner Seite. Obschon ich sie angesichts der Umstände ihrer Geburt nicht als Erbin des Hauses von Valancius anerkennen kann, hat Laria der Dynastie stets treu gedient. Als Truchsessin genießt sie mein volles Vertrauen und unterstützt jede meiner Entscheidungen. Redet mit ihr und überzeugt Euch selbst."
languages.original_text: "Laria is not only my Seneschal, but also my daughter." {n}The Rogue Trader's tone hardens.{/n} "I will not allow you to even ponder the possibility that she is not on my side. Though the dubious circumstances of her birth bar me from recognising her as the heir to House von Valancius, Laria has served the dynasty faithfully. As Seneschal, she deserves my full trust and will support any decision I make. Speak with her and you will see that for yourself."

traits.locale_text: "Laria ist nicht nur meine Truchsessin, sondern auch meine Tochter." {n}Der Ton des Freihändlers verhärtet sich.{/n} "Ich lasse nicht zu, dass Ihr auch nur andeutet, Sie stünde nicht auf meiner Seite. Obschon ich sie angesichts der Umstände ihrer Geburt nicht als Erbin des Hauses von Valancius anerkennen kann, hat Laria der Dynastie stets treu gedient. Als Truchsessin genießt sie mein volles Vertrauen und unterstützt jede meiner Entscheidungen. Redet mit ihr und überzeugt Euch selbst."

languages.text: 「ラリアは私の家臣であり、娘でもある。」{n}ローグトレーダーの口調が硬くなる。{/n}「ラリアが私の側につかない可能性を、君が考えることさえ許さない。彼女の誕生の経緯が疑わしいからこそ、私は彼女をフォン・ヴァランキウス家の後継者として認められない。しかし、ラリアは家臣として忠実に仕えてきた。家臣として、私は彼女を信頼し、私の決断を支えてくれる。ラリアと話し合えば、君もそのことを理解するだろう。」
languages.original_text: "Laria is not only my Seneschal, but also my daughter." {n}The Rogue Trader's tone hardens.{/n} "I will not allow you to even ponder the possibility that she is not on my side. Though the dubious circumstances of her birth bar me from recognising her as the heir to House von Valancius, Laria has served the dynasty faithfully. As Seneschal, she deserves my full trust and will support any decision I make. Speak with her and you will see that for yourself."
